Fix right-click context menu: use mousedown button=2 instead of contextmenu event

On macOS in Electron, contextmenu events can be suppressed. Detecting
right-click via onMouseDown with button===2 is reliable across all cases.
Also add stopPropagation to prevent the event reaching window listeners.

commit.message:
Add --verbose flag for debug output

Adds -v/--verbose flag that prints detailed debug info at every stage:
config values, SSH commands, reachability timing, snapshot file counts,
per-file diff reasons, local change breakdowns, scp timing, and error
details.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix right-click context menu broken by webkit-app-region drag

Electron intercepts right-click at the OS level inside drag regions,
preventing contextmenu events even on no-drag children. Fix by removing
WebkitAppRegion drag from the TabBar container entirely — only the
traffic-light spacer and the flex-1 empty area keep drag, so tabs
receive all mouse events normally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): fix telemetry test assertion and gate release on CI

The telemetry opt-out test was failing because initTelemetry now
receives appVersion and os fields. Use expect.objectContaining to
decouple the assertion from unrelated fields.

Also make the release workflow depend on CI passing before running
release-please, preventing releases from broken builds.

  schema (evidenceSummary, evidenceFor/evidenceAgainst)

  LLM proposing blocked/unpermitted actions, override to null

  summary with period filter (today/week/month)

  department documents with graceful fallback

  department-member relationships, show active situations

  get_org_structure, list_departments, create_situation_type

  rendering for old pros/cons and new evidenceFor/evidenceAgainst formats

New test files covering previously untested pure logic:
- SettingsNotificationFieldsTest (18): notification allowlist, history clamping, parse defaults
- WordBankRepositoryLogicTest (16): key normalization, word parsing, duplicate filtering
- WordBankPromptTest (12): prompt construction, takeLast(30) limit
- LearningContentPromptTest (14): prompt construction, takeLast(20), MAX_VOCABULARY_ITEMS
- CertificatePinningTest (7): pinning config structure and host patterns
- OcrRecognizerSelectionTest (24): language-to-recognizer mapping for all 17 languages
- UiLanguageCorrectionTest (15): language name correction algorithm and data integrity
- CrossLayerIntegrationTest (18): cooldown symmetry, coin economy, notification defaults

commit.message:
Fix video/file-type search and ls sort header bug

- Add sys1 examples for finding videos/images across device using find -ls
  with proper extension grouping and sort -k7 -rn (macOS-compatible)
- Add reformatOutput handler for find -ls output: parses inode/size/path
  columns and converts byte counts to human-readable (K/M/G), handles
  filenames with spaces via f[10...].joined()
- Fix -S flag detection in ls reformatOutput: cmd.contains("-S") was false
  for combined flags like -lhS (no literal "-S" substring). Now extracts
  the flags token and checks for uppercase S within it
- Fix Swift escape: \( in triple-quoted string was parsed as interpolation;
  changed to \\( / \\) to produce literal shell \( \) in the prompt
- Fix sort flag: sort -rh is GNU-only; use sort -rn for macOS compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix ChatGPT parser: handle tool/system messages between user and assistant

The parser only paired user → immediate next assistant, dropping 68/188
conversations that had tool messages (browsing, code interpreter) or
consecutive user/assistant messages between the pair.

Changes:
- Skip tool/system messages when scanning for assistant response
- Merge consecutive user messages (file upload + prompt pattern)
- Skip empty assistant prefix (thinking step before real response)
- 7 new tests covering all patterns

Result: 185/188 conversations now parse (was 120). Remaining 3 are
voice-only conversations with no text content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: knowledge-network

commit.message:
feat: Prefab UI views, ToolResult summaries, renames, UX polish

MCP server:
- Replace 4 HTML/Chart.js resources with Prefab UI tools (app=True):
  get_dashboard_view, get_training_load_view, get_zones_view,
  get_adherence_view, get_planned_workouts_view
- All view tools return ToolResult(content=summary, structured_content=view)
  so the LLM sees data without a second tool call
- asyncio.gather() for parallel data fetching in get_dashboard_view
- Shared helpers: _fmt_date_short, _form_display, _error_app,
  _build_load_chart_data, _acwr_badge_variant, _status_badge_variant
- Chart colors: orange ATL, blue CTL, purple Form (no muddy overlaps)
- Badge for ACWR risk level, Progress bar for adherence/polarization
- Consistent h-full metric cards, p-4 padding on all views
- get_training_load_view: days param (default 42), Form series added
- Recent activities: 25 sessions, paginated 10/page
- Bug fix: dashboard zone pie Z1-Z7 (was Z1-Z5)
- Remove all HTML infrastructure (700+ lines deleted)

CLI renames:
- get_composition → get_training_mix
- get_dashboard → get_dashboard_view
- get_load_view → get_training_load_view
- get_workouts_view → get_planned_workouts_view
- athl analyze composition → athl analyze training-mix
- athl show plans → athl show workouts
- athl show db → athl show status
- athl sync ingest → athl sync load-plans

commit.message:
fix: install slash commands to ~/.claude/commands/ instead of ~/.claude/skills/

Claude Code only recognizes slash commands in ~/.claude/commands/ (user-level)
or .claude/commands/ (project-level). The old ~/.claude/skills/ path was
invisible to Claude Code, so /tmux-* commands never appeared.

Also updates web-install.sh to use the same correct path.

Day 20: Category-aware context assembly, department RAG, scope simplification

- Rewrite context-assembly.ts: replace BFS traversal with category-aware
  department discovery, RAG retrieval, and category-grouped related entities
- Restructure reasoning-prompts.ts: department context, RAG knowledge chunks,
  grouped related entities (People/Operational Data/External Parties)
- Simplify situation-scope.ts: replace 10-hop BFS with direct department
  checks per entity category (parentDepartmentId / department-member rels)

  relationships instead of parentDepartmentId; external count via member hops

commit.message:
fix: make expiry selector functional and suppress init-time mailbox load error

- Re-enable TTL cleanup (only targets expires_at IS NOT NULL AND <= now)
- Backend handleGenerate/handleCreate now read expiry param and set expires_at
  - permanent → NULL (never expires), 1h/24h/3d → computed timestamp
- Existing mailboxes (expires_at = NULL) are never affected by cleanup
- Remove loadAllMailboxes() from admin init to prevent "加载邮箱失败" toast
  (still loads on-demand when switching to all-emails view)

- BBコールレンジ: vs BTN/SBプッシュ(20BB/15BB/10BB)
- 3betレンジ(40BB+): BTN vs CO、SB vs BTN、BB vs BTN

feat: adaptive auto-enhance preprocessing for photo processor

Adds auto_enhance() to photo_engine.py that normalizes exposure in LAB
space before any style is applied. Adaptive gamma correction brings dark
images to well-exposed baseline while leaving bright images untouched.
Includes shadow floor lifting and local contrast enhancement. Removes
hardcoded 0.97 brightness reduction that was darkening all output.

commit.message:
fix: skip caching POST requests in service worker

The Cache API doesn't support POST requests. Add an early return for
non-GET requests to prevent console errors during recipe imports and
other API mutations. Bump cache version to activate the update.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix file search: correct find patterns, smart fallback, better empty message

Bug 1 — LLM generated "*.office*" (dot-prefix extension pattern, never matches)
instead of "*office*". Fix: replace sys1 find example with three explicit ones
using -iname "*keyword*" so the model learns the correct pattern.

Bug 2 — Sparse-output fallback was a no-op for find commands (no pipes to strip,
so fallback == cmd, retry skipped). Add extractFindKeyword/extractFindFolder
helpers + find-specific fallback that rebuilds the command as:
  find <folder> -iname "*<keyword>*" 2>/dev/null
This catches any bad pattern the LLM generated and retries with a correct one.

Bug 3 — Empty output "(command returned no output)" confused Turn 2 into
responding "just tell me the filename". Changed to explicit message:
"The command ran but found no matching results. Tell the user nothing was found."

Also add grep example to sys1: "find files containing budget in documents?"
→ CMD: grep -ril "budget" ~/Documents 2>/dev/null | head -20

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Hearth usage panel — per-provider cost/token/request display (Forge-bo0) (#147)

* feat: add Hearth usage panel with per-provider cost/token display

Add a compact Usage panel below the Workers column in the Hearth TUI
showing today's running totals per provider (Claude, Gemini, Copilot),
token counts with k/M formatting, and total cost vs daily limit.

Changes:
- Add provider_daily_costs table for per-provider cost tracking
- Add AddProviderDailyCost/GetProviderDailyCosts DB methods
- Add PanelUsage to panel enum with Tab navigation support
- Add FetchUsage() data source querying daily + provider costs
- Add renderUsagePanel() and renderCenterColumn() for split layout
- Record per-provider costs in pipeline after smith completion
- Add FormatTokens() helper for compact token display (1.2M/340k)
- Pass DailyCostLimit and CopilotDailyRequestLimit to DataSource

Bead: Forge-bo0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address review comments for Forge-bo0

- Remove dead GetCopilotRequestLimit DB function and its call in FetchUsage (limit comes from config only)
- Fix FormatTokens to use %.1fk for better precision (e.g. 1.5k instead of 1k)
- Remove unreachable workerHeight < 6 guard in renderCenterColumn
- Fix height math in renderCenterColumn (remove erroneous +2 from workerHeight)
- Update TestRenderColumnsAlignedHeight to call renderCenterColumn instead of renderWorkers
- Add tests for renderUsagePanel (no data, with data, zero height) and renderCenterColumn (small/large terminal)

commit.message:
feat(workflow): add user approval gate before merging cap branch to main

- Lead generates CAP_REVIEW.md (summary, AC status, diff stats, QA
  sign-off, architect sign-off, follow-up issues) before any PR
- Lead presents review to user and stops — no PR opened until user
  explicitly approves
- User can request changes → lead loops back to fix, re-validates,
  regenerates review
- PR body is CAP_REVIEW.md itself for full traceability

commit.message:
Add undervoltage watchdog to auto-restart Pi services

After undervoltage events, PM2 services can hang without crashing.
This cron-based watchdog detects undervoltage via vcgencmd, checks
proxy health, and restarts PM2 with a two-strike rule and cooldown.
